# Stoic Journal

> [!TIP]
> Separate what you can control from what you cannot. Use the morning section to choose your stance, then the evening section to review your actions with honesty.

---

## Morning Intention

### What is within my control today?

- [My action, attention, or choice]
- [My preparation]
- [My response to events]

### What is outside my control?

- [Other people's reactions]
- [External timing or outcomes]
- [Uncertainty I need to accept]

### Virtue to practice

> **Today I will practice:** [Wisdom / courage / justice / temperance / another quality]

### Premeditation

**A likely difficulty:** [What may get in the way?]

**My chosen response:** [How will I respond if it happens?]

---

## Evening Memoir

### What did I do well?

[Where did I act according to my values?]

### Where did I lose the thread?

[Where did I react automatically, avoid, overreach, or drift?]

### What will I correct tomorrow?

- [One concrete correction]
- [One reminder to carry forward]

### Closing line

> [One sentence I want to remember]

---

*Captured with Mark It Down*
